name: nansen-onchainos-alpha
description: AI Agent skills that combine Nansen Smart Money Intelligence with OKX OnchainOS for automated on-chain alpha discovery and trade execution
author: NansenOS Team

skills.name: nansen_alpha_scan
skills.description: Scans Nansen smart money data to detect alpha signals — tokens being accumulated by funds, whales, and smart traders. Returns ranked signals with confidence scores.

skills.name: nansen_smart_money_holdings
skills.description: Shows what tokens smart money wallets are currently holding, ranked by total USD value.

skills.name: nansen_fund_tracker
skills.description: Tracks crypto fund buying and selling activity to identify institutional conviction.

skills.name: nansen_signal_trade
skills.description: Detects alpha signals and executes trades via OKX OnchainOS DEX aggregator.

skills.name: nansen_ask
skills.description: Ask the Nansen AI agent questions about on-chain data and market analysis.

features: Smart money alpha detection across multiple chains
Automated trade execution via OnchainOS DEX aggregation
Natural language chat interface for on-chain intelligence
Multi-signal convergence detection for high-confidence entries
Reusable OnchainOS skills for other agents to integrate
